name: catalog validator rejects an applies_to entry that uses a stack tag outside the supported set (react/node/typescript/python/security/infrastructure/library/performance)
command:
mkdir -p sources && printf 'id: bad
source_class: financial-industry
tier: 1
applies_to: [cobol]
' > sources/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source.sh" --source sources/bad.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'applies_to' err.txt && grep -q 'cobol' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
